creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text: I'm not cognizant of the zfs internals, I did a quick search of the zfs sources from which I came to the conclusion that the SPA part is managing the raw devices, am I right? Then I activated that subsystem's debug messages (vfs.zfs.debug set to 32). I expected to see messages when the devices are released but none were printed, not even for the SATA drives. Where should I search next?
